title: [HW] Canonicalize array inject to create; allow struct inject loops

features.name: array_element_procedural_assignment_chain
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block where array elements are assigned individually at sequential indices, creating an inject chain that covers all array elements.

features.name: fully_defined_array_from_inject_chain
features.description: Code should include an array that is defined by setting every element individually through procedural assignments, forming a chain where the initial array value does not propagate through.

features.name: struct_field_procedural_assignment
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block where struct fields are assigned individually, which can form loops that need canonicalization to struct_create.
